sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Vehicle
special_mechanics.description: Deployed from ship to explore planet surfaces in search of minerals, lifeforms, and ruins. Includes heads-up display for status monitoring.

special_mechanics.name: Planet Gravity Destruction
special_mechanics.description: Ship is destroyed if attempting to land on planets with gravity greater than 8.0 g

tier_notes: Tier 2: Starflight is an RPG/space exploration game. Available documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics, story, and exploration systems rather than precise physics parameters. No platforming or character movement mechanics documented. Sources do not contain sub-pixel data, jump physics, gravity values for player movement, or acceleration metrics.
